rows.Notes: Primary fall prevention and work at height control
Continuity and quality of edge protection
Exclusion zones, toe boards, debris/tool control
Barricading, access, services, support, spoil setback
Tagging, inspection, full planking, access, stability
Valid PTW, correct scope, signatories, controls
Physical field verification before permit approval
Lift plan, appointed person, exclusion, rigging
Cleanliness, stacking, access routes, slip/trip control
Fire points, extinguishers, hot work readiness
Temporary power, RCD, condition of tools/cables

rows.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
1. Leadership failure
2. Poor supervision
3. Poor sub-contractor control
4. PTW failure
rows.Immediate_Action_Taken: Unsafe work practices were suspended immediately. The CM of the cluster was called but he refused to visit the location.
rows.Preventive_Action_Required:
1. PTW must be controlled by the main contractor.
2. Close supervision of sub-contractors by main contractor shall be ensured.
3. Non-performing subcontractors shall not be paid and shall be removed from project.
4. Non-performing construction team shall be replaced without delays
rows.Action_Owner:
1-3rd recommendation by the cluster CM
4th recommendation by the PD.

rows.Immediate_Action_Taken: The team was commended for their visible leadership in driving transformation at Cluster 8A.
rows.Preventive_Action_Required:
The Construction Manager and his team were advised to ensure that sub-contractors do not mess up with their site. The following advise was given:
1. No payment for work if site condition is below the acceptable standard.
2. Close supervision of sub-contractors by the construction team of the main contractor.
3. Housekeeping shall be maintined for all shift.
4. Provide a temporary storage area for waste for each villa.
5. PTW shall remain under the control of the main contractor.
rows.Action_Owner:
Construction Manager of Cluster 8A 
HSE Manager of TAJV

notes: Set the control week and month in blue-font cells. This sheet summarizes weekly and current month performance by cluster and highlights weak KPIs / root causes.
Set the selected month and previous month in blue-font cells. Use this view for monthly recognition and improvement review.
Use the control week and month to identify recurring gaps, weak KPIs and likely root causes. This supports weekly corrective and preventive action planning.
